chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-3783 of 2020 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on office objection No.2 2. For order on Misc. No.15868/2020 (Exemption) 3. For order on Misc. No.15869/2020 (Stay) 4. For order on Misc. No.15870/2020 (Inspection) 5. For hearing of main case 22.10.2025 None present for the petitioner -------------------------------- This petition relates to 2020, which is over five years ago. No one has ever appeared on behalf of the petitioner. The petitioner has failed to diligently pursue this petition in the last five years. Today, none present for the petitioner without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
